name: nuclei
summary: Nuclei is a fast template-based vulnerability scanner. Ships thousands of community templates for CVEs, misconfigurations, exposed panels, and more. The iOS runner exposes it for nmap-style network probing of Apple services (mDNS / iTunes sync).

trust.warning: Attribution/index entry only. Audit provenance, code, releases, and licence before use. Operates against the operator's own authorized scope only.
